nasb.text: also for his virgin sister, who is near to him because she has had no husband; for her he may defile himself.

esv.text: or his virgin sister (who is near to him because she has had no husband; for her he may make himself unclean).

cnv.text: 或是仍是處女，未曾出嫁的姊妹等至親，祭司才可以玷污自己。

ccb.text: 以及未出嫁仍是处女的姊妹例外。
